mano_cua.result_summary: 任务要求在 Nuxt 项目中创建 HLViewer.vue 组件文件并编辑页面模板，但 localhost:3000 无文件编辑功能，mano-cua 花 38 步寻找浏览器内文件编辑器未果，无法完成文件创建操作以测试组件发现功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: There's no browser-based file editor available at localhost:3000 or any other available port. The task requires creating HLViewer.vue component file and editing page templates, which is not possible through the localhost:3000 browser interface alone.
